title: Nouriel Roubini: Kevin Warsh’s ideas may not survive contact with reality once he takes charge of the Fed
description: US President Donald Trump may have nominated Kevin Warsh to head the US Federal Reserve for his views on easing credit, but his assumptions could be flawed. AI may not reduce inflation, America’s neutral rate could rise and a smaller balance sheet may not help. Warsh could be in for a reality check.
